description: Test prompts for evaluating Pose LoRA accuracy and control

test_prompts.prompt: a 3d animated character, standing upright pose, arms at sides, feet together, front view, studio lighting
a 3d animated character, sitting pose, legs crossed, hands on knees, three-quarter view, soft lighting
a 3d animated character, walking stride, mid-step, arms swinging naturally, side view, cinematic lighting
a 3d animated character, running pose, dynamic stance, forward lean, front view, dramatic lighting
a 3d animated character, jumping pose, airborne, arms raised, side profile, action lighting
a 3d animated character, crouching pose, knees bent, low stance, back view, moody lighting
a 3d animated character, arms crossed pose, standing confident, front view, strong lighting
a 3d animated character, hands on hips pose, powerful stance, three-quarter view, dramatic lighting

generation_params.negative_prompt: multiple people, blur, low quality, distorted, deformed, bad anatomy
